name: Oak Cliff Christian Federal Credit Union
description_short: Oak Cliff Christian Federal Credit Union is a Dallas-based credit union offering savings accounts, loans, online banking, and member services with a faith-based community focus.
description_long:
Oak Cliff Christian Federal Credit Union (OCCFCU) is a federally chartered credit union headquartered in Dallas, Texas at 1130 W. Camp Wisdom Road. The institution operates with a Christian community orientation, as reflected in its name and mission focus. The credit union has maintained physical branch operations while adapting to digital banking trends.

OCCFCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products and services typical of full-service credit unions. Members can access savings and checking accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), auto loans (both new and used vehicles starting at 3.99% APR), personal loans (starting at 11.39% APR), and share-secured loans (7.25% APR+). The institution provides online banking through its It'sMe247 platform, enabling members to transfer money, manage accounts, apply for loans, and access e-statements. A mobile app was recently launched offering account viewing, e-statements, loan/membership applications, and account opening capabilities. Direct deposit services are available for payroll, Social Security, pensions, and other electronic payments.

OCCFCU distinguishes itself through its community-focused, faith-based approach to member service. The credit union emphasizes paperless account management with e-statements to avoid mail-in fees and promotes financial engagement through dormant account awareness. The organization maintains limited but consistent physical hours (closed Mondays, open Tuesday-Thursday 10am-4pm, Friday 10am-5pm, Saturday 10am-1pm) alongside robust digital access. Its recent mobile app launch and modern online banking platform indicate investment in member convenience.

As a traditional credit union, OCCFCU serves a specific membership base and operates with the cooperative ownership model typical of the credit union sector. Members should verify membership eligibility requirements before applying. The institution's limited physical hours may challenge members who need in-person services outside standard business times. Rate competitiveness appears moderate based on published starting rates, though full rate details require direct inquiry.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Recently launched mobile app with account management, e-statement access, and loan/membership applications
Low auto loan rates starting at 3.99% APR for both new and used vehicles
Online banking platform (It'sMe247) enables money transfers and account management from any internet-connected device
Direct deposit services available for payroll, Social Security, pensions, and electronic payments
Paperless e-statement enrollment eliminates monthly mail-in fees
Saturday hours (10am-1pm) provide weekend access uncommon among many traditional credit unions
Share-secured and personal loan options available for members with varying credit profiles
cons: Very limited branch hours with Monday closure and no evening weekday hours beyond 4-5pm
Membership eligibility may be restricted based on employer, organization, or geographic criteria (not specified on website)
Personal loan APR of 11.39% is significantly higher than auto loan rates, limiting appeal for unsecured borrowing
Website lacks detailed information on membership requirements, eligibility, or application process
No mention of ATM network access, check cashing services, or other basic convenience banking services
best_for: Members of eligible Christian organizations or communities seeking faith-aligned banking
Borrowers focused on auto financing with competitive rates and seeking credit union membership benefits
Dallas-area residents with flexible schedules accommodating the limited branch hours
Members prioritizing digital banking and mobile app access over frequent in-person branch visits
diagnosis: Oak Cliff Christian Federal Credit Union is best for Dallas-area residents and members of eligible organizations seeking traditional credit union membership with competitive auto lending rates and modern digital banking options. The primary caveat is the very limited branch hours (closed Mondays, no weekday evening hours) and unspecified membership eligibility requirements that should be confirmed before applying.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with online purchase capability
Mobile app with account management and e-statements
Direct deposit for payroll, Social Security, and pensions
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1130 W Camp Wisdom Rd, Dallas, TX 75232
